free_text: Cross sections for the Cu(n,xn) and Cu(n,x-gamma)
1872-gms of natural copper, purity greater than 99%.
Shaped into annular ring of 25-cm outer diameter,
Neutron flux measurements uses time of flight
with sample and shadow bar removed. Sample placed
with shadow bar, pulse discrimination used to identify
events as neutrons or gammas. Background determined
NE-213 scintillator placed along samples axis.
Plastic scintillator place on edge of beam 30 meters
from source to monitor flux for normalization.
Cross sections needed for corrections taken from
Corrections made for finite sample effects including:
.average transmission of secondary neutrons and gammas
Reactions corrected. Converted to new date
